channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Delve halts demos, Insight Partners scrubs investment post amid ‘fake compliance’ allegations
item.description: After a whistleblower alleged that the startup fabricated audit evidence, its prominent Series A investor removed an article detailing why it led the deal.

item.title: 20% Off Brooks Promo Code & Deals for | March 2026
item.description: Enjoy 20% off your first order with a Brooks coupon code, plus top discounts and deals on our favorite Brooks running shoes.

item.title: Ulta Coupons and Deals: Up to 50% Off in March
item.description: Shop the latest beauty trends and save big using an Ulta promo code for beauty tech, makeup, and more.

item.title: Sony Promo Codes and Discounts: 45% Off
item.description: Upgrade your setup with Sony’s newest releases. Save on industry-leading noise-canceling audio, and pro-level Alpha cameras.

item.title: Design Within Reach Promo Codes: 30% Off | March 2026
item.description: Get 30% off, 20% off, and free shipping with our Design Within Reach coupon codes, plus up to 50% off furniture with these special discounts.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for March 24, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for March 24, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.
